judge_reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed text content ('UFO sighting on 18 Feb 45', 'Lists witnesses', 'Incident 101 - Norcatur Kansas') that Description A does not mention, and the two descriptions disagree on the content of the typed text that surrounds the visual elements.
original_image_tags: Dark, grainy scan of a typewritten document. The text is light-colored against a dark background. "CONFIDENTIAL" stamps are visible at the top and bottom of the page, both struck through with a horizontal line. The top stamp is partially faded. Three hole-punch marks are visible on the left margin. A handwritten number "102" is visible in the bottom right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten document page with two circular binder holes on the left margin, faint “CONFIDENTIAL” stamps near the top and center, and a paragraph describing a “huge multi-colored ball of fire” sighting; no photograph or diagram is present.*
